mapper.select:
select * from product_profile where 1=1
and (product_name like concat('%',#{s.keyword},'%') or product_alias like concat('%',#{s.keyword},'%') or positioning like concat('%',#{s.keyword},'%') or selling_points like concat('%',#{s.keyword},'%'))
and category=#{s.category} and enabled=#{s.enabled} order by enabled desc, updated_at desc, id desc
select * from product_profile where product_name=#{productName} and enabled=1 limit 1

select * from product_profile where enabled=1 and ( product_name=#{productName} or product_alias like concat('%',#{productName},'%') or #{productName} like concat('%', product_name, '%') ) order by case when product_name=#{productName} then 1 when product_alias like concat('%',#{productName},'%') then 2 else 3 end, updated_at desc, id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into product_profile(product_name, product_alias, category, positioning, spec_json, selling_points, usage_scenarios, common_issues, troubleshooting_steps, comparison_text, retention_script, after_sale_advice, enabled) values(#{productName}, #{productAlias}, #{category}, #{positioning}, #{specJson}, #{sellingPoints}, #{usageScenarios}, #{commonIssues}, #{troubleshootingSteps}, #{comparisonText}, #{retentionScript}, #{afterSaleAdvice}, coalesce(#{enabled}, 1))
mapper.update: update product_profile set product_name=#{productName}, product_alias=#{productAlias}, category=#{category}, positioning=#{positioning}, spec_json=#{specJson}, selling_points=#{sellingPoints}, usage_scenarios=#{usageScenarios}, common_issues=#{commonIssues}, troubleshooting_steps=#{troubleshootingSteps}, comparison_text=#{comparisonText}, retention_script=#{retentionScript}, after_sale_advice=#{afterSaleAdvice}, enabled=coalesce(#{enabled}, 1) where id=#{id}
